name: Turkey Breast with Tropical Fruit Salsa
recipeInstructions:
-------------------TROPICAL FRUIT SALSA-------------------
17 oz Mango slices; drain and cube
1 c Strawberries; slice
1/2 c Kiwi; dice
3 tbsp Red onion; finely chop
3 tbsp Fresh lime juice
1 tsp Grated lime peel
1/4 tsp Ginger
In a medium bowl, gently combine all salsa ingredients.
Cover; refrigerate at least 1 hour to blend flavors.
Heat grill. When ready to cook, oil grill rack. Place turkey on gas grill over low heat or on charcoal grill, 4-6 inches from medium coals. Cook 8-10 minutes or until no longer pink, turning once. Serve with salsa.
